What's happening? Hey, what do you say we get some money? I know I'd like to. So that's what we're going to do in this video, potentially a series of videos. So here's what we're going to do. If you look on the screen here, I'm going to just outline an existing offer that I've been using as kind of our demonstration offer in this class. And it starts where people can buy something for $4. It's a bundle of four courses for $4. And there's an order form there. And there are a couple of order bumps on that order form. Those are like additional purchases they can make. And then there are, I think, three one-click upsells. So they all just put this as upsells. And then these little boxes represent all of the different one-click upsells. So I was looking at this offer and I was like, you know, I want to demonstrate how to do this and how to, like, just take something you've already got with minimal complexity and minimal changes and minimal work, really, and just deploy it and sell some stuff. So that's what we're going to do. So I decided to focus on this fourth upsell product right here. And this is the webpage that sells this product. So this is a one-click upsell in my funnel. So what I want to do with this is I want to send my email database. This offer, which is, hey, get this big discount on a bundle of really cool courses right now. I just want to use, like, everything that's already available and use a lot of templated stuff and sort of have you look over my shoulder as we do this. Are we going to make a billion dollars from this? No. But it's probably going to do pretty good. And it's definitely going to make more money than if we did nothing. And that's what I really want to show you is that, you know, doing the simple, obvious things usually makes a lot more money than if you just didn't do it or if you just sat around and over thought everything.
